lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: Fourth consecutive bar-raise, fourth identical action list, but the verdict steps back up from stalled to at-risk for one mechanical reason: a commit finally landed. b41b853 ("add .project-context.json (schema v1)", 2026-05-29) is the first commit since v0.3.0 on 2026-05-26, so the tree is no longer frozen and the stalled clause no longer fires. The catch: that commit touched none of the five carried actions, and both HIGHs are still open and byte-identical to 05-27/-28/-29 (the Discord webhook is still tracked and ungitignored; write-dashboard-status.ps1:98-105 still hardcodes barRaise.* = null), which pins the verdict at at-risk. Nick is active in this repo and routing around the action list, not blocked on it. One v0.3.1 patch that bundles the dirty tree with the five one-line fixes clears the board. Product remains healthy.
